name: Rockland Trust Company
description_short: Rockland Trust is a full-service bank offering personal and business checking, savings, mortgages, home equity products, and commercial banking services with FDIC insurance backing.
description_long:
Rockland Trust Company is a traditional bank providing comprehensive financial services to both personal and business customers. The bank emphasizes community presence with multiple branch locations and offers FDIC insurance protection backed by the full faith and credit of the U.S. Government, ensuring deposit safety up to regulatory limits. The institution has established itself as a regional banking partner with extended customer service hours (M-F 7am-8pm, Sat 8am-5pm, Sun 10am-3pm) and maintains both personal and business customer information centers.

The bank offers a diverse range of products including personal checking and savings accounts, money market accounts, relationship accounts, and personal loans. For mortgage needs, Rockland Trust provides express mortgage options with advertised rates as low as 6.874% APR (20-year term) and home equity lines of credit at 6.240% APR. Business customers can access business checking, savings accounts, business credit cards, merchant services, fraud protection, term loans, and lines of credit. Commercial banking clients benefit from commercial real estate loans, C&I loans, equipment leasing, international banking, treasury management, and commercial credit and purchasing cards.

Rockland Trust distinguishes itself through its mobile banking platform featuring fingerprint and Face ID authentication, mobile check deposit functionality, and account management tools. The bank actively supports community development through grants, donations, and event sponsorships. Their "YourBanker" dedicated banker service connects customers with personalized financial support. The institution also provides financial literacy education through programs like Ms. Money & the Coins and hosts community Shred Day events for secure document disposal.

As a traditional brick-and-mortar bank, Rockland Trust serves customers seeking established banking infrastructure with physical branch access, though online and mobile capabilities are available. The bank's specific rates and terms vary by product and individual qualification. Customers should verify current rates, terms, and lending requirements directly through the bank's website or branch locations. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Personal savings accounts and money market accounts
Mobile banking app with biometric authentication and mobile check deposit
pros: FDIC-insured deposits backed by full faith and credit of U.S. Government
Extended customer service hours including Sunday (10am-3pm) access
Mobile banking with biometric authentication (fingerprint and Face ID)
Mobile check deposit feature for convenient account funding
Dedicated "YourBanker" service for personalized financial support
Comprehensive product suite: personal banking, mortgages, home equity, business services, and commercial banking
Active community involvement with grants, donations, and sponsorships
cons: Limited information on specific account fees, minimum balance requirements, or interest rates for basic checking/savings accounts
No mention of special promotional rates or sign-up bonuses for new accounts
Website does not display current interest rates for savings products or money market accounts
best_for: Small to medium-sized business owners seeking comprehensive commercial banking and merchant services
Homeowners looking for mortgage refinancing or home equity borrowing with established local bank support
Customers who value in-person branch access and relationship banking over digital-only solutions
diagnosis: Rockland Trust is best for personal and business customers seeking a traditional full-service bank with physical branch locations, FDIC insurance protection, and comprehensive financial products from checking to commercial lending. The primary consideration is that this is a traditional regional bank rather than a specialized lender, so customers should compare rates and terms directly as the website provides limited specific pricing details.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
meta_description: Rockland Trust offers personal and business checking, savings, mortgages, home equity, and commercial banking with FDIC insurance.
